note: is_today, is_upcoming and is_finished are computed as of generated_utc (UTC). Recompute from utc_date / match_date if you need them relative to another time.

files.standings.json: Group standings, one row per team per group, ranked (JSON).
files.standings.csv: Group standings, one row per team per group, ranked (CSV).
files.worldcup26.rds: list(matches, teams, chat_data, standings, third_place) for R, lossless types.
